title: phaseolus minimus f. lobatus
intro: Phaseolus minimus f. lobatus, also known as the miniature kidney bean or dwarf kidney bean, is a small, annual legume native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, gout, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phaseolus minimus f. lobatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, all of which contribute to overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
